items.title: How Dsquared2 and Damiani turned checkout friction into a growth lever
items.summary: For many brands, international growth has become less of a market-entry challenge and more of an execution challenge.

items.title: Beauty Briefing: How exclusivity is driving niche fragrance sales
items.summary: Niche fragrance brands like Ex Nihilo are driving hype and creativity through exclusivity in the US market.

items.title: Unilever World Cup partnership is a beta test for its new social-first strategy
items.summary: Unilever VP of integrated brand experiences discusses social-first beauty brand strategy for 2026.

items.title: How 3 brands are using TikTok Shop to expand abroad
items.summary: Modern Retail spoke with three brands including K-beauty company Medicube using TikTok Shop for international expansion.

items.title: What is next for international shipping as EU ends de minimis exemption
items.summary: Starting July 1, low-value packages to EU will face 3 EUR flat customs duty affecting cross-border sellers.

items.title: Brands Briefing: Measurement is the next frontier in GEO for brands
items.summary: AI-powered brand visibility measurement becomes critical for DTC and beauty brands in 2026.

items.title: Niche Fragrance Brands D.S. & Durga and Ex Nihilo drive North America sales through exclusivity
items.summary: Niche fragrance brands including D.S. & Durga and Ex Nihilo (Paris) are growing North America market share through limited edition drops, scarcity marketing, and specialty retail exclusivity. Price band: 20-50 USD per bottle. Target audience: 25-40 urban professionals.

items.title: K-beauty brand Medicube expands internationally via TikTok Shop with viral skincare devices
items.summary: K-beauty brand Medicube is leveraging TikTok Shop for international expansion including North America. Their AGE-R Booster H (skincare device) and skincare serums are trending with Gen Z consumers. Price band: 0-50 USD. TikTok-viral products showing strong growth signals.

items.title: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream consistently tops Amazon Beauty bestseller list in North America
items.summary: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream remains a consistent North America beauty bestseller on Amazon, highly rated by dermatologists. Features ceramides and hyaluronic acid. Price: ~7-2 USD. 100,000+ reviews, 4.8 stars. Barrier-repair and drugstore pricing narrative resonates strongly.

items.title: e.l.f. Cosmetics Halo Glow Liquid Filter viral on TikTok, top ranking in US beauty
items.summary: e.l.f. Cosmetics continues dominating affordable beauty segment. Halo Glow Liquid Filter (4 USD) and Power Grip Primer (0 USD) consistently viral on TikTok. 4.5+ stars, 50,000+ reviews on Ulta. Inclusive pricing and Gen Z appeal make them top sellers at Target and Ulta.

items.title: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% dominates affordable skincare segment at Sephora and Ulta
items.summary: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% Zinc 1% Serum ( USD) is a perennial bestseller at Sephora, Ulta and Amazon. High active concentration at drugstore price, strong clinical claims (pore-reducing, oil-control). 4.6 stars, 80,000+ reviews. Gen Z skincare staple.
